title: Trump makes Pearl Harbor remark in meeting with Japan's PM
summary_full: President Trump compared US strikes on Iran to the deadly 1941 Japanese attack and declaration of war as part of World War Two.
summary_public: President Trump compared US strikes on Iran to the deadly 1941 Japanese attack and declaration of war as part of World War Two.
